subcodes.first_line: In this day doth every hour, with a most exalted call, proclaim: "By the life of God! The Hour hath come" [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز هر ساعتی از ساعات آن باعلی الندآء میگوید لعمر الله قد اتت الساعه و
subcodes.subjects: @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @chastisement and requital, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
